jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at upGrad
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? upGrad in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad:
upGrad is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad!
